name: is-blocked-in-china
description: A small API and web UI for checking whether a domain is likely blocked in China.

scripts.build: node --check src/check.js && node --check src/ui.js && node --check src/worker.js && node --check src/server.js
scripts.typecheck: node --check src/check.js && node --check src/ui.js && node --check src/worker.js && node --check src/server.js
